title: Create: Double Ores
description: Adds ore doubling by crushing raw ores with Create’s Crushing Wheels.
body:
# ⚙ Create: Double Ores

**Create: Double Ores** enhances the Crushing Wheel process by increasing the value of raw ores — while staying fully aligned with Create’s intended progression.

Raw ores and raw ore blocks now yield guaranteed crushed outputs, with optional bonus drops configurable for balanced automation setups.

No new mechanics.  
Just more efficient processing.

***

## ✨ Features

✔ Crushing recipes for Raw Iron, Raw Copper, Raw Gold, and Raw Zinc  
(items and raw ore blocks supported)

✔ Guaranteed baseline output:  
     – 1 Crushed Ore per raw ore  
     – 9 Crushed Ore per raw ore block

✔ Configurable bonus crushed ore yield (default: up to +50%)

✔ Bonus Experience Nuggets as byproducts  
    (separate config values for items and blocks)

✔ Individual config entries per ore type and raw ore blocks

***

## ⚙ Designed for Create

The mod integrates directly into existing Crushing Wheel setups and rewards:

• Automated ore processing lines  
• Large-scale factory builds  
• Efficiency-focused Create systems

It preserves Create’s progression philosophy while improving throughput.

***

## 🔧 Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1  
NeoForge  
Create 6.0.6+

***

## 📦 Modpacks

✔ Allowed  
Fully configurable for custom balancing.

***
